  "findings": [
    "Missing check valve in the boiler/pump piping loop",
    "Uncontrolled gravity flow occurring through the system when the pump is off"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Install the specified check valve (flow control valve) in the piping loop as per the hydronic drawing and manufacturer instructions",
    "Re-test the system to ensure gravity flow is prevented and pump operation is correct"
  ],
  "rationale": "The absence of a check valve allows unwanted gravity circulation (thermosiphoning) when the pump is not running, which violates standard hydronic piping designs, manufacturer installation manuals, and approved submittal drawings.",
  "references": [
    "Manufacturer Installation Manuals",
    "Approved Hydronic Piping Submittals & Drawings"
  ]
}
